title: The Savage Horde
writer: Kenneth Gamet, Thames Williamson, Gerald Geraghty
actors: Bill Elliott, Lorna Gray, Grant Withers
plot: On the run from the U.S. Army, Ringo ends up in a small Utah town where he takes sides in a land feud between local ranchers but he always keeps an eye out for the Army patrols closing-in on him.
